title: Require Generic Service Anchor Exports
forbids: an existing service spine file without the direct generic const export for its role
why: A direct base, contract, service, module, or router anchor gives every service spine file one stable structural name while callers provide product qualification.
remediate: Directly export base from base.ts, contract from contract.ts, service from root impl.ts, module from module.ts, and router from router.ts. Leave export-use and intentional-boundary decisions to Knip and the dedicated JSDoc boundary.
message: Each service spine file must directly export its generic local anchor.
